name: Diabetic Cotton Candy Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Granulated sugar replacement or granulated fructose
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar replacement, orange oil, and orange rind into the stiff egg whites.
2. Drop batter onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
3. Bake at 325°F for 8-10 minutes.
4. Remove from oven immediately.
5. Note: 6 cookies made with sugar replacement contain negligible calories (10). 6 cookies made with fructose contain 1/5 of a fruit exchange, which is equivalent to 22 calories.
